creator: hodong@nimfsoft.art
text:
Hello.

Freshports' librime page informs that librime is licensed under the GPLv3.

https://www.freshports.org/chinese/librime/

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/chinese/librime/Makefile?view=markup&pathrev=549619#l11

By the way, lotem committed on Dec 29, 2014
switch to the (3-Clause) BSD License.
https://github.com/rime/librime/commit/918b67d1a8ba74fc08f2c7d71823e31e5b013911

https://github.com/rime/librime/blob/master/LICENSE

I think it is necessary to update the license information of librime in Freshports to BSD-3-Clause.
